name: Panel
description: Organizes and divides application content areas using flat background surfaces and layout hierarchy.

Panel.description: Non-interactive container surface for grouping and visually segmenting content.

props.variant: Visual variant for background hierarchy: primary, secondary, tertiary.
props.style: Inline style overrides for size/layout when needed.

variant.description: Background styling variant for content hierarchy.

children.description: Content rendered inside the panel surface.

className.description: Additional class names applied to panel root.

style.description: Inline style overrides for dimensions or layout tuning.

keyboard: Tab — Focus moves to interactive descendants; Panel itself is not focusable by default
aria: aria-label — Use when Panel is promoted to a named region
aria-labelledby — Use when Panel region is labeled by visible heading
